testcase.name: test_public_profile_by_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration65_features.py:244: in test_public_profile_by_id assert response.status_code == 200, f"Public profile endpoint failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Public profile endpoint failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
